notes: All 7 acceptance criteria implemented: (1) Add Improvement dialog on step/section/touchpoint detail panels using Radix Dialog + DialogPrimitive.Title (BUG-023 pattern), pre-fills linked entity IDs, calls createImprovementIdea(), toast on success/error. (2) New page at /w/[workspaceId]/improvements — server component fetches improvement_ideas + entity lookup tables (steps/sections/touchpoints). (3) ImprovementsView with status tabs (All/Proposed/Approved/In Progress/Completed/Rejected) and priority filter dropdown, cards with title/status badge/priority badge/linked entity link/description preview. (4) Inline status change via DropdownMenu on each card calls updateImprovementIdea() with optimistic local state update. (5) Sidebar Lightbulb nav item between Prioritization and Comments with open count badge via useEffect fetch (excludes completed/rejected). (6) 'improvements' added to workspace-shell reserved paths array. (7) !p.includes('/improvements') added to Workflows active check in sidebar.
